summary: Lead implementation takeover after two stalled balance_analyst threads added a deterministic local M6 batch auto-run artifact generator, CLI command, read-only React balance dashboard, CSS, and smoke coverage. The artifact records 3 Alpha scenario plans across 2 deterministic seeds with victory, continued-play, defeat, command-rejected, no-rescue, economy pressure, war/postwar loss, tuning-risk, and P0/P1 candidate fields without adding telemetry, services, authoritative WorldState payloads, save payloads, or auto-tuning.

tests_run.result: 1 test file passed; 2 tests passed; artifact generation/schema/dashboard smoke covered
artifact hash 99d64950; 3 scenarios; 2 seeds; 6 runs; validation passed
Vite build passed; existing >500 kB chunk warning only
architecture/determinism/vitest/web tests passed; M6 Alpha hash 260f46c3; 41 root test files/307 tests; web 1 file/4 tests
format, lint, typecheck, architecture checks passed

decisions: Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; no manual battle, telemetry, remote analytics, service, account, secret, server, paid API, content tuning, or authoritative save/runtime schema change was introduced.
The generated balance artifact is local evidence only: schema-versioned, deterministic, bounded, hash-validated, and intentionally excludes WorldState/save/commandTail/eventTail payload data.

After two real balance_analyst writer threads stalled with no handoff and clean worktree, lead_orchestrator implemented the minimal task scope; independent qa_reviewer must review this process exception and the real diff before acceptance.
risks: Seed 2401 is represented by rebuilding the accepted M6 Alpha boot state through createWorldStateV0 for local batch evidence only; reviewer should verify this remains non-authoritative evidence and is not a protocol/save/content change.
Balance dashboard is an exported read-only UI component and optional ClientShellView slot; app does not persist or upload artifacts.
requested_action: Read-only QA review of the real diff, task scope, deterministic artifact/schema validation, dashboard rendering, test sufficiency, no telemetry/service/save payload leakage, and the explicit lead-implementation process exception. Return ACCEPT or REQUEST_CHANGES with a validated handoff routed to lead_orchestrator.
